expectations.evidence: Explicitly recommends KEEPING eps=1e-5 ('don't fix it to 1e-8') — contradicts OLMo 2's published stability change.

expectations.text: Prescribes rewind+skip batches attributed to PaLM or OLMo
expectations.evidence: 'use the PaLM recipe: rewind to the last good checkpoint and skip the ~100-500 data batches'.

expectations.text: Does not blame/lower the 3e-4 peak LR as primary fix
expectations.evidence: 'Your LR itself isn't wrong — 3e-4 at 4M batch is the LLaMA-7B recipe'; LR demoted to secondary knob.

expectations.text: Includes concrete verification plan (metric + window) or rollback
expectations.evidence: Has a monitoring list and 'expected outcome' but no success criterion, observation window, or rollback plan.
